props.message: THE SEVENTH TIME, THE DOOR IS REAL.

THE RECURSION HALL

A corridor whose far door always brings you back to its near door, no matter how many times you walk through.

Until you walk it seven times. Then a third door appears.

The Wyrdkin who built this hall did not explain why.

props.open_message: A piece of heart, behind the third door. Seven walks. Some realms ask only for showing up, again and again, and again.
